title: FillableForm
description: A shareable document fill request (LinkToFill) created from a template.

id.description: Unique identifier for the fillable form (link_to_fill_id)

access.description: Access level: public (anyone with link) or private (requires account)

status.description: Whether the form is accepting submissions

email_required.description: Whether fillers must provide their email address

name_required.description: Whether fillers must provide their name

allow_downloads.description: Whether fillers can download the completed document

redirect_url.description: URL to redirect fillers after form completion

notification_emails.description: Email addresses to notify on new submissions

reusable.description: If true, a new fillable copy is created for each submission

enforce_required_fields.description: Prevent form from being closed before all required fields are filled

welcome_screen.description: Show a welcome agreement screen each time the form is opened

short_url.description: Shareable short URL for the fillable form

callback_url.description: Webhook URL called when a form is submitted

custom_logo_id.description: ID of custom branding logo to display

folder_id.description: ID of the folder containing this form

created_at.description: Timestamp when the form was created

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the form was last updated
